questionHtml:
What is the concentration of chloride ions, in mol dm−3, in a solution formed by mixing 200 cm3 of 1 mol dm−3 HCl with 200 cm3 of 5 mol dm−3 NaCl?

A.  1

B.  2

C.  3

D.  6

meta.title: What is the concentration of chloride ions, in mol dm−3, in a solution formed by mixing 200 cm3 of 1 mol dm−3 HCl with 200 cm3 of 5 mol dm−3 NaCl? A. 1 B. 2 C. 3 D. 6
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 1. Models of the particulate nature of matter
Structure 1.4—Counting particles by mass: The mole
Structure 1.4.5—The molar concentration is determined by the amount of solute and the volume of solution. Solve problems involving the molar concentration, amount of solute and volume of solution.
